---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents:
    - posts/*/index.qmd
    - "!personal/**"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title]
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  table-hover: true
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Personal Blog
Looking for the personal blog? [Click here](personal/index.html) (password required).
:::
